title: Welcome Screen
description: Adds a 100% customizable welcome & update screen on world join.
body:
Welcome Screen

Allows to add welcome and "What's new" update screens, fully customizable using FancyMenu. Great for accessibility and showing important information.

Requires Necronomicon API and FancyMenu.

Update Screen requires Better Compatibility Checker.

--- ## ⭐ Features ⭐ ### **Welcome Screens** Welcome Screens are only shown one time, once a player installs the modpack and joins a world or server, then it no longer shows. Useful to show important information, like keybinds, etc. **Example:** ![Welcome Screen Example](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/nvb-uy/cdn/340ef7daa553e2889b949340210fefd076da6e48/desc/welcomescreen/example.png) ### **Update Screens** Update Screens will appear when the user updates the modpack directly from their launcher, and serve as a way to showcase important changes in the newer version, etc. --- ## 💫 Config 💫
